calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets; Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Nov-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Martin N. Lettunich, counsel for Petitioner John Torrano

The Court recites its understanding of the facts, noting that the petition is not a typical Heggstad petition in that the asset to be declared a "trust asset" is already in a trust, albeit a different trust. At the Court's query, Mr. Lettunich confirms the same and notes that his research suggests that the instant facts are not substantially different from Heggstad. After further discussion, the Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Peter J. Busch; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
